Weekly Message

This week

Weekly Message

From the Rabbi · Week of July 11, 2026

This week's message

Shalom. This is a sample weekly message. Replace this text with the rabbi's note for the week — a short teaching, theme, or pastoral word that people can read on their phones after scanning the QR code.

Outline

  1. Opening — Welcome and framing for the week
  2. Torah focus — Key verse or idea from the parasha
  3. Discussion — One or two questions for the table / class
  4. Practice — A concrete mitzvah or habit for the week
  5. Closing — Blessing or takeaway

Schedule

  • Friday — Kabbalat Shabbat
  • Saturday — Morning service & kiddush
  • Sunday — Study session (optional)

Notes

Add any announcements, readings, or links here. Markdown supports bold, italics, lists, and links.

All weeks
